items.summary: ENGLAND fans were left gobsmacked when footie ace Phil Foden turned up to watch the Three Lions at their local village boozer. items.summary: ARGENTINA boss Lionel Scaloni was so emotional after beating Egypt he couldn't finish his post-match interview. items.title: Belgium's Onana out of World Cup with ACL injury
items.summary: Belgium midfielder Amadou Onana has been ruled out of the World Cup after suffering an anterior cruciate ligament injury, the Red Devils have confirmed.
